summary: Test suite has decent unit test coverage of module internals but critically misses requirement for integration testing through GitHub Actions workflow. Requirements explicitly state 'all testing goes through the pipeline' and 'Do NOT test your script directly,' yet 14 of 25 tests are direct Pester unit tests, not act-based. Only 3 integration cases run through act (all-green, hard-failure, flaky), missing many scenarios. Workflow.Tests.ps1 validates structure via fragile regex matching on YAML rather than functional testing. No persistent fixture files created. Integration assertions (RECAP parsing) are fragile. Would catch module-level regressions but miss most pipeline failures.
